summary: Excellent audience recording of an iconic May 16 1981 show, celebrated as one of the best Dead concerts of the ’80s.
review: Both reviewers rate this performance a five‑star triumph, calling it comparable to the classic 1977 era and a highlight of the often‑underrated 1981 spring/summer tour. The source is praised for its Sennheiser 421 microphone setup and “master” quality tape, delivering crystal‑clear sound that lets the band’s high energy shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong, unanimous praise for both musical performance and recording fidelity; limited to two detailed reviews, so confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with a Sennheiser 421 mic setup from a master tape source; reviewers note crisp, clear sound with no reported flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Highly energetic and tightly performed show that many fans rank alongside the band’s classic late‑70s concerts.
